EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} added permissions ({object.value}) on the device "{datafield1}" for user {object.name} on host {dst.host}
The user {subject.name} modified permissions ({object.value}) on the device "{datafield1}" for the user {object.name} on host {dst.host}
The user {subject.name} revoked permissions on the device {datafield1} for the user {object.name} on host {dst.host}
